title: Hl7SchemaConfig
description: Root config message for HL7v2 schema. This contains a schema structure of groups and segments, and filters that determine which messages to apply the schema structure to.

messageSchemaConfigs.description: Map from each HL7v2 message type and trigger event pair, such as ADT_A04, to its schema configuration root group.

version.description: Each VersionSource is tested and only if they all match is the schema used for the message.
